```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 12,
  fig.height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)
```

# ãƒ—ãƒ­ã‚¸ã‚§ã‚¯ãƒˆæ¦‚è¦

## ç›®çš„
1. **scFFPE Figure 2**: ICIç‰¹ç•°çš„ã‚·ã‚°ãƒãƒãƒ£ãƒ¼ã®ã‚½ãƒ¼ã‚¹ã‚¨ãƒ“ãƒ‡ãƒ³ã‚¹ã‚’ç¤ºã™
   - 2A: Workflow schematicï¼ˆæ‰‹å‹•ä½œæˆæ¸ˆã¿ï¼‰
   - 2B: scFFPE UMAP (ä¸»è¦ç´°èƒžã‚¿ã‚¤ãƒ—ã¨ã‚·ã‚°ãƒãƒãƒ£ãƒ¼éºä¼å­)
   - 2C: scFFPE DEG heatmap
   
2. **CosMx Figure 4**: Tç´°èƒžÃ—éª¨é«„ç³»ç´°èƒžã®ç©ºé–“çš„ç›¸äº’ä½œç”¨
   - 4A: Nearest-neighbor Tâ†’Myeloid distance
   - 4B: Co-localization index
   - 4C: Exhaustion-high T cells Ã— Myeloid-Activation-high overlap
   - 4D: Spatial correlation (Ripley's K or radial density)

## ãƒ‡ãƒ¼ã‚¿æ§‹é€ 
- **scFFPE**: `/Users/HiroyukiArai/Documents/å¤§å­¦é™¢/ç ”ç©¶çµæžœ/2024æ‘ä¸Šå…ˆç”ŸCosMX/202406 single cell FFPE data/scFFPE_kidney_analysis/results/scffpe_additional_analysis_complete_doublet_removed.rds`
- **CosMx**: `/Users/HiroyukiArai/Documents/å¤§å­¦é™¢/ç ”ç©¶çµæžœ/2024æ‘ä¸Šå…ˆç”ŸCosMX/20251117_CosMx_SCT_nolabeltransfer_comprehensive_annotation.rds`
- **Signatures**: `ICI_signature_candidates_for_CosMx.rds`

# 1. ç’°å¢ƒæº–å‚™ {.tabset .tabset-fade}

## ãƒ©ã‚¤ãƒ–ãƒ©ãƒªèª­ã¿è¾¼ã¿

```{r load_libraries}
cat("=== Loading Required Libraries ===\n")

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  # Core
  library(Seurat)
  library(SeuratObject)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(tibble)
  
  # Visualization
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
  library(viridis)
  library(RColorBrewer)
  library(pheatmap)
  library(ggrepel)
  
  # Spatial analysis
  library(spatstat)
  library(dbscan)
  
  # Statistics
  library(ggpubr)
  library(rstatix)
  
  # Data handling
  library(readxl)
  library(DT)
  library(kableExtra)
})

cat("âœ… All libraries loaded\n")
cat("Seurat version:", as.character(packageVersion("Seurat")), "\n")
cat("R version:", R.version.string, "\n\n")
```

## ãƒ‡ã‚£ãƒ¬ã‚¯ãƒˆãƒªè¨­å®š

```{r setup_directories}
cat("=== Setting up Directories ===\n")

# 2ã¤ã®å¯èƒ½æ€§ã®ã‚ã‚‹ãƒ™ãƒ¼ã‚¹ãƒ‡ã‚£ãƒ¬ã‚¯ãƒˆãƒªã‚’è©¦è¡Œ
base_dir_options <- c(
  "/Users/HiroyukiArai/Documents/2025å¹´ç•™å­¦/ç ”ç©¶é–¢é€£/ç ”ç©¶çµæžœ/202509 cosmx-kidney-project",
  "/Users/HiroyukiArai/Documents/å¤§å­¦é™¢/ç ”ç©¶çµæžœ/2024æ‘ä¸Šå…ˆç”ŸCosMX"
)

base_dir <- NULL
for (dir in base_dir_options) {
  if (dir.exists(dir)) {
    base_dir <- dir
    break
  }
}

if (is.null(base_dir)) {
  stop("âŒ Base directory not found. Please check the path.")
}

cat("âœ… Using base directory:", base_dir, "\n")

# scFFPE directory
scffpe_base <- "/Users/HiroyukiArai/Documents/å¤§å­¦é™¢/ç ”ç©¶çµæžœ/2024æ‘ä¸Šå…ˆç”ŸCosMX/202406 single cell FFPE data/scFFPE_kidney_analysis"
scffpe_data_dir <- file.path(scffpe_base, "results")
scffpe_deg_dir <- file.path(scffpe_base, "results/DEG_analysis")

# CosMx directory
cosmx_data_dir <- base_dir

# Output directory - timestamped
timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
output_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "results/figures", 
                        paste0("20251125_Figure2_and_Figure4_", timestamp))
dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Create subdirectories
dir.create(file.path(output_dir, "Figure2"), showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(file.path(output_dir, "Figure4"), showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(file.path(output_dir, "Statistics"), showWarnings = FALSE)

cat("\nDirectory structure:\n")
cat("  scFFPE data:", scffpe_data_dir, "\n")
cat("  scFFPE DEG:", scffpe_deg_dir, "\n")
cat("  CosMx data:", cosmx_data_dir, "\n")
cat("  Output:", output_dir, "\n\n")
```

## ã‚«ãƒ©ãƒ¼ãƒ‘ãƒ¬ãƒƒãƒˆå®šç¾©

```{r define_colors}
cat("=== Defining Color Palettes ===\n")

# Condition colors
condition_colors <- c(
  "ICI-AKI" = "#E41A1C",
  "ICI_AKI" = "#E41A1C",
  "Rejection" = "#377EB8",
  "Drug-induced_AKI" = "#4DAF4A",
  "Drug_AKI" = "#4DAF4A"
)

# Sample colors
sample_colors <- c(
  "S0" = "#377EB8",
  "S1" = "#E41A1C",
  "S2" = "#4DAF4A",
  "S3" = "#984EA3"
)

# Major cell type colors
major_celltype_colors <- c(
  "Epithelial" = "#E41A1C",
  "Tubular_cells" = "#E41A1C",
  "Endothelial" = "#377EB8",
  "Immune" = "#4DAF4A",
  "Immune_cells" = "#4DAF4A",
  "Stromal" = "#984EA3",
  "Stromal_cells" = "#984EA3",
  "Other" = "#999999"
)

# Immune cell type colors
immune_colors <- c(
  "CD4_T_cell" = "#E41A1C",
  "CD8_T_cell" = "#377EB8",
  "DP_T_cell" = "#4DAF4A",
  "T_cell" = "#984EA3",
  "Treg" = "#FF7F00",
  "B_cell" = "#FFFF33",
  "Macrophage" = "#A65628",
  "Dendritic_cell" = "#F781BF",
  "NK_cell" = "#999999"
)

cat("âœ… Color palettes defined\n\n")
```

## è«–æ–‡ç”¨ãƒ†ãƒ¼ãƒž

```{r plot_theme}
cat("=== Defining Publication Theme ===\n")

# Base theme for all plots
theme_publication <- function(base_size = 12) {
  theme_bw(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      # Text
      plot.title = element_text(size = base_size + 2, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_size, hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = base_size, face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = base_size - 1, color = "black"),
      
      # Legend
      legend.title = element_text(size = base_size, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = base_size - 1),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black"),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm"),
      
      # Panel
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey90", size = 0.3),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),
      
      # Strip (facet labels)
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = "black"),
      strip.text = element_text(size = base_size, face = "bold"),
      
      # Margins
      plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)
    )
}

cat("âœ… Publication theme defined\n\n")
```

---

# 2. ãƒ‡ãƒ¼ã‚¿èª­ã¿è¾¼ã¿ {.tabset .tabset-fade}

## scFFPEãƒ‡ãƒ¼ã‚¿èª­ã¿è¾¼ã¿

```{r load_scffpe}
cat("=== Loading scFFPE Data ===\n")

scffpe_file <- file.path(scffpe_data_dir, "scffpe_additional_analysis_complete_doublet_removed.rds")

if (!file.exists(scffpe_file)) {
  stop("âŒ scFFPE file not found: ", scffpe_file)
}

cat("Loading scFFPE object...\n")
scffpe <- readRDS(scffpe_file)

cat("âœ… scFFPE data loaded\n")
cat("Total cells:", ncol(scffpe), "\n")
cat("Total genes:", nrow(scffpe), "\n")
cat("Assays:", names(scffpe@assays), "\n")

# Check metadata
cat("\nAvailable metadata columns:\n")
print(colnames(scffpe@meta.data))

# Create group column if not exists
if (!"group" %in% colnames(scffpe@meta.data)) {
  cat("\nCreating 'group' column...\n")
  
  # Check sample column name
  sample_col <- if ("sample" %in% colnames(scffpe@meta.data)) {
    "sample"
  } else if ("orig.ident" %in% colnames(scffpe@meta.data)) {
    "orig.ident"
  } else {
    stop("Cannot find sample information column")
  }
  
  # Create group
  scffpe$group <- case_when(
    grepl("S0", scffpe@meta.data[[sample_col]]) ~ "Rejection",
    grepl("S1|S3", scffpe@meta.data[[sample_col]]) ~ "ICI_AKI",
    grepl("S2", scffpe@meta.data[[sample_col]]) ~ "Drug_AKI",
    TRUE ~ "Unknown"
  )
  
  cat("âœ… 'group' column created\n")
  print(table(scffpe$group))
}

cat("\n")
```

## CosMxãƒ‡ãƒ¼ã‚¿èª­ã¿è¾¼ã¿
```{r load_cosmx}
cat("=== Loading CosMx Data ===\n")

# ã‚·ã‚°ãƒãƒãƒ£ãƒ¼ã‚¹ã‚³ã‚¢ä»˜ãCosMxãƒ•ã‚¡ã‚¤ãƒ«ï¼ˆFigure 3ã¨åŒã˜ï¼‰
cosmx_file <- "/Users/HiroyukiArai/Documents/2025å¹´ç•™å­¦/ç ”ç©¶é–¢é€£/ç ”ç©¶çµæžœ/202509 cosmx-kidney-project/results/figures/20251120_CosMx_Signature_Projection_20251120_175233/CosMx_with_signatures_20251120_175944.rds"

if (!file.exists(cosmx_file)) {
  stop("âŒ CosMx file not found: ", cosmx_file)
}

cat("Loading CosMx object from:", basename(cosmx_file), "\n")
cosmx <- readRDS(cosmx_file)

cat("âœ… CosMx data loaded\n")
cat("Total cells:", ncol(cosmx), "\n")
cat("Total genes:", nrow(cosmx), "\n")
cat("Samples:", paste(unique(cosmx$sample), collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Check metadata
cat("\nAvailable metadata columns:\n")
print(colnames(cosmx@meta.data))

# Check for signature scores
sig_cols <- grep("_1$", colnames(cosmx@meta.data), value = TRUE)
cat("\n=== Signature Scores Available ===\n")
print(sig_cols)

# Check for spatial coordinates
if ("x_slide_mm" %in% colnames(cosmx@meta.data)) {
  cat("\nâœ… Using x_slide_mm, y_slide_mm (global slide coordinates)\n")
  x_col <- "x_slide_mm"
  y_col <- "y_slide_mm"
} else if ("x_global_px" %in% colnames(cosmx@meta.data)) {
  cat("âœ… Using x_global_px, y_global_px\n")
  x_col <- "x_global_px"
  y_col <- "y_global_px"
} else if ("x_FOV_px" %in% colnames(cosmx@meta.data)) {
  cat("âš ï¸ Using x_FOV_px, y_FOV_px (FOV-level coordinates)\n")
  x_col <- "x_FOV_px"
  y_col <- "y_FOV_px"
} else {
  stop("âŒ No coordinate columns found")
}

cat("\n")
```

## Signatureèª­ã¿è¾¼ã¿

```{r load_signatures}
cat("=== Loading ICI Signatures ===\n")

signature_file <- file.path(scffpe_deg_dir, "ICI_signature_candidates_for_CosMx.rds")

if (!file.exists(signature_file)) {
  stop("âŒ Signature file not found: ", signature_file)
}

signatures <- readRDS(signature_file)

cat("âœ… Signatures loaded\n")
cat("Number of signatures:", length(signatures), "\n")
cat("\nSignature names:\n")
for (i in seq_along(signatures)) {
  sig_name <- names(signatures)[i]
  sig_genes <- signatures[[i]]
  cat(sprintf("  %2d. %-30s: %2d genes\n", i, sig_name, length(sig_genes)))
}

cat("\n")
```

## DEGçµæžœèª­ã¿è¾¼ã¿

```{r load_deg_results}
cat("=== Loading DEG Results ===\n")

# ICI-specific genes
ici_specific_file <- file.path(scffpe_deg_dir, "ICI_specific_genes_all_cells.csv")

if (file.exists(ici_specific_file)) {
  ici_specific_genes <- read.csv(ici_specific_file)
  cat("âœ… ICI-specific genes loaded:", nrow(ici_specific_genes), "genes\n")
} else {
  cat("âš ï¸ ICI-specific genes file not found\n")
  ici_specific_genes <- NULL
}

# Cell type-specific DEGs
celltype_deg_file <- file.path(scffpe_deg_dir, "All_celltype_specific_DEGs.csv")

if (file.exists(celltype_deg_file)) {
  celltype_degs <- read.csv(celltype_deg_file)
  cat("âœ… Cell type-specific DEGs loaded:", nrow(celltype_degs), "entries\n")
} else {
  cat("âš ï¸ Cell type-specific DEG file not found\n")
  celltype_degs <- NULL
}

cat("\n")
```

---

# 3. Figure 2: scFFPE Signature Source Evidence {.tabset .tabset-fade}

## Figure 2B: scFFPE UMAP (ä¿®æ­£ç‰ˆ)
```{r figure2b_umap, fig.width=16, fig.height=14}
cat("=== Creating Figure 2B: scFFPE UMAP ===\n")

# Set default assay
DefaultAssay(scffpe) <- "RNA"

# Run UMAP if not present
if (!"umap" %in% names(scffpe@reductions)) {
  cat("Running UMAP...\n")
  scffpe <- RunUMAP(scffpe, dims = 1:30, reduction = "pca")
}

# Check available cell type columns
cat("\nAvailable cell type information:\n")
if ("major_celltype" %in% colnames(scffpe@meta.data)) {
  cat("âœ… major_celltype found\n")
  cat("   Categories:", paste(unique(scffpe$major_celltype), collapse = ", "), "\n")
}
if ("detailed_celltype" %in% colnames(scffpe@meta.data)) {
  cat("âœ… detailed_celltype found\n")
  cat("   Categories (", length(unique(scffpe$detailed_celltype)), " types)\n")
}

# Define comprehensive color palette for major cell types
major_celltype_colors_full <- c(
  # Immune cells
  "T_NK_cells" = "#E41A1C",
  "B_Plasma_cells" = "#377EB8",
  "Myeloid_cells" = "#4DAF4A",
  # Epithelial/Tubular
  "Tubular_cells" = "#984EA3",
  "Glomerular_cells" = "#FF7F00",
  # Stromal/Endothelial
  "Endothelial_cells" = "#FFFF33",
  "Stromal_cells" = "#A65628",
  # Other
  "Other" = "#999999",
  "Unassigned" = "#F781BF"
)

# Plot 1: UMAP by major cell type (ã™ã¹ã¦è¡¨ç¤º)
cat("\nCreating major cell type UMAP...\n")

# â˜… Other ã‚’å‡¡ä¾‹ã®ä¸€ç•ªä¸‹ã«ã™ã‚‹ï¼ˆãƒ¬ãƒ™ãƒ«ä¸¦ã³æ›¿ãˆã ã‘ï¼‰
scffpe$major_celltype <- factor(
  scffpe$major_celltype,
  levels = c(
    setdiff(unique(scffpe$major_celltype), "Other"),
    "Other"
  )
)

p2b_major <- DimPlot(
  scffpe,
  reduction = "umap",
  group.by = "major_celltype",
  cols = major_celltype_colors_full,
  pt.size = 0.5,
  alpha = 0.5,
  raster = FALSE,
  raster.dpi = c(1024, 1024),
  label = TRUE,
  label.size = 4,
  repel = TRUE
) +
  theme_publication() +
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1) + 
  labs(
    title = "scFFPE: Major Cell Types",
    subtitle = sprintf("n = %d cells, %d types", 
                      ncol(scffpe), 
                      length(unique(scffpe$major_celltype))),
    x = "UMAP 1",
    y = "UMAP 2"
  ) +

  # â˜… å‡¡ä¾‹ã‚’ç¸¦ 1 åˆ—ã«
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3), ncol = 1))

# Plot 2: UMAP by detailed cell type
cat("Creating detailed cell type UMAP...\n")

# Plot 2: UMAP by detailed cell type
cat("Creating detailed cell type UMAP...\n")

# Generate color palette for detailed cell types
n_detailed <- length(unique(scffpe$detailed_celltype))
detailed_colors <- colorRampPalette(
  c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8", "#4DAF4A", "#984EA3",
    "#FF7F00", "#FFFF33", "#A65628", "#F781BF")
)(n_detailed)
names(detailed_colors) <- sort(unique(scffpe$detailed_celltype))

p2b_detailed <- DimPlot(
  scffpe,
  reduction = "umap",
  group.by = "detailed_celltype",
  cols = detailed_colors,
  pt.size = 0.5,
  alpha = 0.5,  # è¿½åŠ : é€æ˜Žåº¦èª¿æ•´
  raster = FALSE,  # å¤‰æ›´: ã‚ˆã‚Šé®®æ˜Žã«
  label = FALSE,  # å¤‰æ›´: TRUEã«ã™ã‚‹ã¨ãƒ©ãƒ™ãƒ«ãŒã¤ã
  label.size = 3,
  repel = TRUE
) +
  theme_publication() +
  labs(
    title = "scFFPE: Detailed Cell Types",
    subtitle = sprintf("n = %d cells, %d types",
                      ncol(scffpe),
                      n_detailed),
    x = "UMAP 1",
    y = "UMAP 2"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    legend.position = "right",  # å¤‰æ›´: å‡¡ä¾‹ã‚’å³å´ã«
    legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm"),  # å‡¡ä¾‹ã‚¢ã‚¤ã‚³ãƒ³ã‚’å°ã•ã
    aspect.ratio = 1  # è¿½åŠ : æ­£æ–¹å½¢ã«ã™ã‚‹
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2), ncol = 1))  # å¤‰æ›´: 1åˆ—è¡¨ç¤º

# Plot 3: UMAP by condition
# Condition colors (Drug_AKI / ICI_AKI / Rejection)
condition_colors <- c(
  "Drug_AKI" = "#4DAF4A",
  "ICI_AKI"  = "#E41A1C",
  "Rejection"= "#377EB8"
)

p2b_condition <- DimPlot(
  scffpe,
  reduction = "umap",
  group.by = "group",
  cols = condition_colors,
  split.by  = "group",   # â˜… æ¡ä»¶ã”ã¨ã«ãƒ‘ãƒãƒ«åˆ†å‰²
  ncol      = 3,
  pt.size = 0.3,
  alpha = 0.8,
  raster = FALSE,
  raster.dpi = c(1024, 1024)
) +
  theme_publication() +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1) + 
  labs(
    title = "scFFPE: Condition",
    x = "UMAP 1",
    y = "UMAP 2"
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3)))

# Plot 4: Feature plot for key signature genes
key_genes <- c("PDCD1", "HAVCR2", "CXCL9", "SPP1", "GPX3", "CXCL14")

# éºä¼å­ã‚¢ãƒŽãƒ†ãƒ¼ã‚·ãƒ§ãƒ³å®šç¾©ï¼ˆã“ã“ã«è¿½åŠ ï¼‰
gene_annotations <- data.frame(
  gene = c("PDCD1", "HAVCR2", "CXCL9", "SPP1", "GPX3", "CXCL14"),
  category = c("T Exhaustion", "T Exhaustion", "IFN/Myeloid", 
               "Biomarker", "Tissue Stress", "Immune-Tubule"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

key_genes_available <- intersect(key_genes, rownames(scffpe))

cat("Key genes available:", length(key_genes_available), "/", length(key_genes), "\n")

p2b_features <- FeaturePlot(
  scffpe,
  features = key_genes_available[1:min(6, length(key_genes_available))],
  reduction = "umap",
  ncol = 3,
  pt.size = 0.5,
  raster = FALSE,
  raster.dpi = c(512, 512),
   cols       = c("grey90", "yellow", "orange", "red", "darkred"),
  order = TRUE,
  min.cutoff = "q60",   # ä¸‹ä½60%ã‚’ã‚°ãƒ¬ãƒ¼ã«ã¾ã¨ã‚ã‚‹
  max.cutoff = "q99" 
) &
  theme_publication() &
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 8)
  )&
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1)

# ã•ã‚‰ã«å„éºä¼å­ã«èª¬æ˜Žã‚µãƒ–ã‚¿ã‚¤ãƒˆãƒ«è¿½åŠ ï¼ˆæŽ¨å¥¨ï¼‰
for(i in seq_along(key_genes_available)) {
  gene <- key_genes_available[i]
  category <- gene_annotations$category[gene_annotations$gene == gene]
  p2b_features[[i]] <- p2b_features[[i]] + 
    labs(subtitle = category)
}
  
  # Combine all plots
if (length(key_genes_available) > 0) {
  p2b_combined <- (p2b_major | p2b_condition) / 
                  p2b_detailed / 
                  p2b_features +
    plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1, 1.2)) +
    plot_annotation(
      title = "Figure 2B: scFFPE Single-Cell Transcriptomic Atlas",
      theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
    )
 } else {
  # Without feature plots
  p2b_combined <- (p2b_major | p2b_condition) / p2b_detailed +
    plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1))
}

print(p2b_combined)

# Save
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_dir, "Figure2/Figure2B_scFFPE_UMAP.png"),
  plot = p2b_combined,
  width = 16,
  height = 14,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_dir, "Figure2/Figure2B_scFFPE_UMAP.pdf"),
  plot = p2b_combined,
  width = 16,
  height = 14
)

# Print cell type distribution summary
cat("\n=== Cell Type Distribution ===\n")
cat("\nMajor cell types:\n")
print(table(scffpe$major_celltype))

cat("\nDetailed cell types (top 15):\n")
detailed_table <- sort(table(scffpe$detailed_celltype), decreasing = TRUE)
print(head(detailed_table, 15))

# Save cell type statistics
write.csv(
  data.frame(
    CellType = names(table(scffpe$major_celltype)),
    Count = as.numeric(table(scffpe$major_celltype)),
    Percentage = round(as.numeric(table(scffpe$major_celltype)) / ncol(scffpe) * 100, 2)
  ),
  file.path(output_dir, "Statistics/Figure2B_major_celltype_distribution.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  data.frame(
    CellType = names(table(scffpe$detailed_celltype)),
    Count = as.numeric(table(scffpe$detailed_celltype)),
    Percentage = round(as.numeric(table(scffpe$detailed_celltype)) / ncol(scffpe) * 100, 2)
  ),
  file.path(output_dir, "Statistics/Figure2B_detailed_celltype_distribution.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("âœ… Figure 2B created and saved\n\n")
```

## Figure 2C: ICI Signature Expression by Cell Type
```{r figure2c_signature_heatmap, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
cat("=== Creating Figure 2C: ICI-AKI Signature Heatmap (simplified) ===\n")

if (!is.null(ici_specific_genes)) {

  ## ---- STEP 1: Gene selection (scFFPE-driven) ----

  # scFFPE ã§åˆ©ç”¨å¯èƒ½ãª Top DEGï¼ˆeffect sizeé †ï¼‰
  top_deg_genes <- ici_specific_genes %>%
    dplyr::filter(gene %in% rownames(scffpe)) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(mean_log2FC))) %>%
    dplyr::slice(1:20) %>%
    dplyr::pull(gene)

  cat("Top 20 DEG genes identified in scFFPE.\n")

  # å¿…é ˆéºä¼å­ï¼ˆFigure2B / CosMx signature ã¨æ•´åˆï¼‰
  mandatory_genes <- c(
    "PDCD1",   # Immune / IFN (T exhaustion)
    "HAVCR2",  # Immune / IFN
    "CXCL9",   # Immune / IFN
    "SPP1",    # Tubular / metabolic (biomarker)
    "GPX3",    # Tubular / metabolic (stress)
    "CXCL14"   # Tubular / metabolic (immune-tubule)
  )

  # çµ±åˆï¼ˆmandatory + Top DEGï¼‰
  key_signature_genes <- unique(c(mandatory_genes, top_deg_genes))

  # scFFPE ã«å­˜åœ¨ã™ã‚‹éºä¼å­ã®ã¿
  key_genes_available <- intersect(key_signature_genes, rownames(scffpe))

  # å‚è€ƒï¼šCosMx ãƒ‘ãƒãƒ«ã¨ã®ã‚ªãƒ¼ãƒãƒ¼ãƒ©ãƒƒãƒ—ï¼ˆãƒ•ã‚£ãƒ«ã‚¿ã¯ã—ãªã„ï¼‰
  if (exists("signatures") && !is.null(signatures)) {
    cosmx_genes   <- unique(unlist(signatures))
    overlap_genes <- intersect(key_genes_available, cosmx_genes)

    cat("\nCosMx panel overlap (for reference):\n")
    cat("  Genes in Figure 2C:", length(key_genes_available), "\n")
    cat("  Available in CosMx:", length(overlap_genes),
        "(", round(100 * length(overlap_genes) /
                      max(1, length(key_genes_available)), 1), "% )\n")
    cat("  Overlap genes:", paste(overlap_genes, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")
  }

  ## éºä¼å­æ•°ã‚’ 15â€“25 ã«åˆ¶é™ï¼ˆmandatory ã‚’å„ªå…ˆï¼‰
  if (length(key_genes_available) > 25) {
    mandatory_available <- mandatory_genes[mandatory_genes %in% key_genes_available]
    remaining_slots     <- 25 - length(mandatory_available)
    other_genes         <- setdiff(key_genes_available, mandatory_available)
    key_genes_available <- c(mandatory_available,
                             head(other_genes, max(0, remaining_slots)))
  }

  cat("=== Final Gene Set ===\n")
  cat("Total genes:", length(key_genes_available), "\n")
  cat("Mandatory genes included:",
      sum(mandatory_genes %in% key_genes_available), "/",
      length(mandatory_genes), "\n")
  cat("Genes:\n"); print(key_genes_available); cat("\n")

  if (length(key_genes_available) >= 10) {

    ## ---- STEP 2: Condition Ã— major_celltype pseudobulk ----

    pseudobulk_list <- list()

    for (condition in unique(scffpe$group)) {
      for (ct in unique(scffpe$major_celltype)) {

        cells <- rownames(scffpe@meta.data)[
          scffpe@meta.data$group == condition &
            scffpe@meta.data$major_celltype == ct
        ]

        # ç´°èƒžãŒå°‘ãªã™ãŽã‚‹çµ„ã¿åˆã‚ã›ã¯é™¤å¤–
        if (length(cells) >= 10) {
          expr_data <- GetAssayData(scffpe,
                                    slot = "data",
                                    assay = "RNA")[key_genes_available, cells,
                                                   drop = FALSE]
          mean_expr <- rowMeans(expr_data)
          sample_id <- paste0(condition, "_", ct)
          pseudobulk_list[[sample_id]] <- mean_expr
        }
      }
    }

    if (length(pseudobulk_list) == 0) {
      cat("âš ï¸ No pseudobulk groups with â‰¥10 cells; skip Figure 2C.\n\n")
    } else {

      pseudobulk_matrix <- do.call(cbind, pseudobulk_list)
      cat("Pseudobulk matrix:", nrow(pseudobulk_matrix), "genes x",
          ncol(pseudobulk_matrix), "samples\n")

      ## ---- STEP 3: Scaling & annotations ----

      # gene-wise Z-score
      pseudobulk_scaled <- t(scale(t(pseudobulk_matrix)))
      pseudobulk_scaled[is.na(pseudobulk_scaled)] <- 0
      pseudobulk_scaled[pseudobulk_scaled >  2.5] <-  2.5
      pseudobulk_scaled[pseudobulk_scaled < -2.5] <- -2.5

      # åˆ—ã‚¢ãƒŽãƒ†ãƒ¼ã‚·ãƒ§ãƒ³
col_anno_df <- data.frame(
  Sample = colnames(pseudobulk_scaled),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # Condition ã¯å…ˆé ­ã®å˜èªžï¼ˆDrug, ICI, Rejectionï¼‰
    Condition  = sub("_.*", "", Sample),

    # Cell_Type ã¯ã€Œå…ˆé ­ã®å˜èªž + ã‚¢ãƒ³ãƒ€ãƒ¼ã‚¹ã‚³ã‚¢ã€ã‚’è½ã¨ã—ãŸæ®‹ã‚Š
    # Drug_AKI_Endothelial_cells â†’ AKI_Endothelial_cells
    # Rejection_Endothelial_cells â†’ Endothelial_cells
    Cell_Type  = sub("^[^_]+_", "", Sample),

    # ã•ã‚‰ã« AKI_ ã¨ã„ã†ãƒ—ãƒ¬ãƒ•ã‚£ãƒƒã‚¯ã‚¹ãŒä»˜ã„ã¦ã„ãŸã‚‰å‰Šã‚‹
    # AKI_Endothelial_cells â†’ Endothelial_cells
    Cell_Type  = sub("^AKI_", "", Cell_Type)
  )
      rownames(col_anno_df) <- col_anno_df$Sample
      col_anno_df$Sample    <- NULL

      ## Broad lineage ã«ã¾ã¨ã‚ã‚‹ï¼ˆTubular / Immune / Myeloid / ãªã©ï¼‰
      col_anno_df$Broad_CellType <- dplyr::case_when(
        grepl("Tubul",   col_anno_df$Cell_Type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Tubular",
        grepl("Myeloid", col_anno_df$Cell_Type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid",
        grepl("T_NK|Tcell|T_cell|B_Plasma|Bcell",
              col_anno_df$Cell_Type, ignore.case = TRUE)           ~ "Immune",
        grepl("Endothel",col_anno_df$Cell_Type, ignore.case = TRUE)~ "Endothelial",
        grepl("Stromal", col_anno_df$Cell_Type, ignore.case = TRUE)~ "Stromal",
        TRUE                                                        ~ "Other"
      )
   ## Condition colors ã‚’è«–æ–‡å…¨ä½“ã§çµ±ä¸€
      condition_colors <- c(
        "Drug"      = "#4DAF4A",  # green
        "ICI"       = "#E41A1C",  # red
        "Rejection" = "#377EB8"   # blue
      )
   ## Condition colorsï¼ˆDrug=ç·‘, ICI=èµ¤, Rejection=é’ ã«å›ºå®šï¼‰
      present_conditions <- sort(unique(col_anno_df$Condition))
      cond_cols <- condition_colors[present_conditions]

      ## Broad cell type colorsï¼ˆã“ã®Figureå°‚ç”¨ã«è‡ªå‹•ç”Ÿæˆï¼‰
      present_broad <- sort(unique(col_anno_df$Broad_CellType))
      if (!requireNamespace("RColorBrewer", quietly = TRUE)) {
        install.packages("RColorBrewer")
      }
      base_pal <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(max(length(present_broad), 3), "Set2")
      celltype_cols <- setNames(
        base_pal[seq_along(present_broad)],
        present_broad
      )

      ## annotation_colors
      ann_colors <- list(
        Condition   = cond_cols,
        Cell_Type   = celltype_cols   # Broad_CellType ã‚’è¡¨ç¤ºåã«ä½¿ã†
      )

      ## ä¸¦ã³æ›¿ãˆï¼šCondition â†’ Broad_CellType
      col_anno_df$Condition      <- factor(col_anno_df$Condition,
                                           levels = present_conditions)
      col_anno_df$Broad_CellType <- factor(col_anno_df$Broad_CellType,
                                           levels = present_broad)

      col_anno_df <- col_anno_df %>%
        dplyr::arrange(Condition, Broad_CellType)

      pseudobulk_scaled <- pseudobulk_scaled[, rownames(col_anno_df)]

      # Conditionãƒ–ãƒ­ãƒƒã‚¯ã®åŒºåˆ‡ã‚Š
      gap_positions <- which(diff(as.numeric(col_anno_df$Condition)) != 0)
     
# xè»¸ãƒ©ãƒ™ãƒ«ã¨ã—ã¦ä½¿ã† cell type åï¼ˆConditionã¯è‰²ãƒãƒ¼ã§ç¤ºã™ï¼‰
labels_col <- as.character(col_anno_df$Cell_Type)
      
      # pheatmap ç”¨ã« annotation_col ã‚’ä½œæˆï¼ˆCondition / Broad_CellTypeï¼‰
      anno_col_for_pheatmap <- data.frame(
        Condition = col_anno_df$Condition,
        Cell_Type = col_anno_df$Broad_CellType,
        row.names = rownames(col_anno_df),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )



      ## ---- STEP 4: Heatmap ----

      heat_cols <- colorRampPalette(c("navy", "white", "firebrick3"))(100)

      p2c_heatmap <- pheatmap::pheatmap(
        mat               = pseudobulk_scaled,
        color             = heat_cols,
        breaks            = seq(-2.5, 2.5, length.out = 101),
        cluster_rows      = TRUE,
        cluster_cols      = FALSE,
        clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
        clustering_method = "ward.D2",
        annotation_col    = anno_col_for_pheatmap,
        annotation_colors = ann_colors,
        gaps_col          = gap_positions,
        show_colnames     = TRUE,
        show_rownames     = TRUE,
        fontsize_row      = 9,
        fontsize_col      = 7,
        angle_col         = 45,
        main              = "ICI-AKI signature genes across condition and cell lineages (scFFPE)",
        border_color      = NA,
        cellwidth         = 15,
        cellheight        = 12,
        silent            = TRUE,
        labels_col        = labels_col
)

      ## ---- Save outputs ----
      png(
        filename = file.path(output_dir,
                             "Figure2/Figure2C_scFFPE_signature_by_celllineage.png"),
        width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", res = 300
      )
      print(p2c_heatmap)
      dev.off()

      pdf(
        file = file.path(output_dir,
                         "Figure2/Figure2C_scFFPE_signature_by_celllineage.pdf"),
        width = 10, height = 8
      )
      print(p2c_heatmap)
      dev.off()

      # å…ƒã® pseudobulk è¡Œåˆ—ã‚‚æ›¸ãå‡ºã—ï¼ˆãƒ¬ãƒ“ãƒ¥ãƒ¼å¯¾å¿œç”¨ï¼‰
      write.csv(
        pseudobulk_matrix,
        file.path(output_dir, "Statistics/Figure2C_pseudobulk_expression.csv")
      )

      cat("âœ… Figure 2C (simplified) created and saved.\n\n")
    }

  } else {
    cat("âš ï¸ Not enough key signature genes (need â‰¥10, found",
        length(key_genes_available), ")\n\n")
  }

} else {
  cat("âš ï¸ ici_specific_genes is NULL; skip Figure 2C.\n\n")
}

```


      ## è¡Œã‚¢ãƒŽãƒ†ãƒ¼ã‚·ãƒ§ãƒ³ï¼šGene Category ã‚’ 3 ç¾¤ã«çµ±åˆ
      gene_names <- rownames(pseudobulk_scaled)
      gene_anno <- data.frame(
        Category = dplyr::case_when(
          gene_names %in% c("PDCD1", "HAVCR2", "CTLA4",
                            "ENTPD1", "CXCL9", "CXCL10",
                            "ISG15", "IFIT3") ~ "Immune",
          gene_names %in% c("SPP1", "GPX3", "ALDOB", "UMOD",
                            "FABP1", "HPD",
                            "SLC34A1", "SLC22A7", "SLC13A3",
                            "SLC6A19", "SLC9A3", "CXCL14") ~ "Tubular",
          TRUE ~ "Other"
        ),
        row.names = gene_names,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )

      ann_colors$Category <- c(
        "Immune"       = "#E41A1C",
        "Tubular"= "#377EB8",
        "Other"              = "#999999"
      )


## Figure 2 çµ±åˆç¢ºèª

```{r figure2_summary}
cat("=== Figure 2 Summary ===\n")

cat("Figure 2 Components:\n")
cat("  2A: Workflow schematic (æ‰‹å‹•ä½œæˆæ¸ˆã¿)\n")
cat("  2B: scFFPE UMAP âœ…\n")
cat("  2C: DEG Heatmap âœ…\n")
cat("  2D-2F: CosMx projection (æ—¢å­˜Figure 2)\n\n")

cat("Message:\n")
cat("  scFFPEç”±æ¥ã®ICIç‰¹ç•°çš„ã‚·ã‚°ãƒãƒãƒ£ãƒ¼ã®\n")
cat("  ã‚½ãƒ¼ã‚¹ã‚¨ãƒ“ãƒ‡ãƒ³ã‚¹ã‚’æç¤º\n\n")
```

---

# 4. Figure 4: T cell Ã— Myeloid Spatial Coupling {.tabset .tabset-fade}

## ãƒ‡ãƒ¼ã‚¿æº–å‚™: ç´°èƒžã‚µãƒ–ã‚»ãƒƒãƒˆæŠ½å‡º

```{r figure4_data_prep}
cat("=== Preparing Data for Figure 4 ===\n")

# Extract immune cells
cat("Extracting immune cells...\n")
immune_cells <- subset(cosmx, subset = major_celltype == "Immune")
cat("Total immune cells:", ncol(immune_cells), "\n")

# Check immune subtypes
cat("\nImmune subtypes available:\n")
print(table(immune_cells$immune_subtype))

# Define T cells and Myeloid cells
# Tç´°èƒžï¼šT_cell_General ã¨ NK_T_cell ã‚’å«ã‚€
tcell_types <- c("T_cell_General", "NK_T_cell")
myeloid_types <- c("Macrophage", "Dendritic_cell", "Monocyte")

# Extract T cells
tcells <- subset(immune_cells, subset = immune_subtype %in% tcell_types)
cat("\nT cells (combined):", ncol(tcells), "\n")
cat("  By subtype:\n")
print(table(tcells$immune_subtype))

# Extract Myeloid cells
myeloid <- subset(immune_cells, subset = immune_subtype %in% myeloid_types)
cat("\nMyeloid cells:", ncol(myeloid), "\n")
cat("  By subtype:\n")
print(table(myeloid$immune_subtype))

# Note on T cell classification
cat("\n=== Note ===\n")
cat("Due to CosMx's 1000-gene panel limitation, we analyze T cells as a combined group\n")
cat("rather than attempting uncertain CD4/CD8 subclassification.\n")
cat("This approach ensures robust spatial interaction analysis.\n\n")
```

## Figure 4A: Nearest-Neighbor Distance

```{r figure4a_nn_distance, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
cat("=== Creating Figure 4A: Tâ†’Myeloid Nearest-Neighbor Distance ===\n")

# === FIX: Update condition_colors to match actual condition values ===
cat("\n=== Fixing color mapping ===\n")

# æ­£ã—ã„conditionåã«å¯¾å¿œã—ãŸã‚«ãƒ©ãƒ¼ãƒ‘ãƒ¬ãƒƒãƒˆã‚’ä½œæˆ
condition_colors_fixed <- c(
  "ICI-AKI" = "#E41A1C",           # èµ¤
  "Rejection" = "#377EB8",          # é’
  "Drug-induced_AKI" = "#4DAF4A"   # ç·‘
)

cat("Original condition_colors:\n")
print(condition_colors)

cat("\nFixed condition_colors:\n")
print(condition_colors_fixed)

# ä»¥é™ã®ãƒ—ãƒ­ãƒƒãƒˆã§ã“ã¡ã‚‰ã‚’ä½¿ç”¨
condition_colors <- condition_colors_fixed

# Calculate nearest-neighbor distances for each sample
nn_distances_list <- list()

for (sample_id in unique(cosmx$sample)) {
  cat("\nProcessing sample:", sample_id, "\n")
  
  # Get T cells and Myeloid cells for this sample
  tcells_sample <- subset(tcells, subset = sample == sample_id)
  myeloid_sample <- subset(myeloid, subset = sample == sample_id)
  
  if (ncol(tcells_sample) > 0 && ncol(myeloid_sample) > 0) {
    
    # Extract coordinates
    tcell_coords <- tcells_sample@meta.data[, c(x_col, y_col)]
    myeloid_coords <- myeloid_sample@meta.data[, c(x_col, y_col)]
    
    # Calculate nearest-neighbor distances
    nn_dists <- apply(tcell_coords, 1, function(tcell_pos) {
      distances <- sqrt(
        (myeloid_coords[, 1] - tcell_pos[1])^2 +
        (myeloid_coords[, 2] - tcell_pos[2])^2
      )
      min(distances)
    })
    
    # Store results
    nn_distances_list[[sample_id]] <- data.frame(
      cell_id = colnames(tcells_sample),
      sample = sample_id,
      condition = unique(tcells_sample$condition)[1],
      nn_distance = nn_dists,
      immune_subtype = tcells_sample$immune_subtype
    )
    
    cat("  T cells:", nrow(tcell_coords), "\n")
    cat("  Myeloid cells:", nrow(myeloid_coords), "\n")
    cat("  Mean NN distance:", round(mean(nn_dists), 3), "\n")
  }
}

# Combine results
nn_distances_df <- bind_rows(nn_distances_list)

cat("\nâœ… Nearest-neighbor distances calculated\n")
cat("Total T cells analyzed:", nrow(nn_distances_df), "\n\n")

# Statistical comparison
stat_test <- nn_distances_df %>%
  wilcox_test(nn_distance ~ condition) %>%
  add_significance()

cat("Statistical test results:\n")
print(stat_test)

# Visualization: Violin plot
p4a_violin <- ggplot(nn_distances_df, aes(x = condition, y = nn_distance, fill = condition)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white", outlier.shape = NA) +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = list(
      c("ICI-AKI", "Rejection"),
      c("ICI-AKI", "Drug-induced_AKI")
    ),
    method = "wilcox.test",
    label = "p.format"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = condition_colors) +
  theme_publication() +
  labs(
    title = "Figure 4A: T Cell â†’ Myeloid Cell Distance",
    subtitle = "Nearest-neighbor distance analysis",
    x = "Condition",
    y = "Distance (Î¼m or pixels)",
    fill = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

print(p4a_violin)

# Cumulative distribution
p4a_cumulative <- ggplot(nn_distances_df, aes(x = nn_distance, color = condition)) +
  stat_ecdf(size = 1.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = condition_colors) +
  theme_publication() +
  labs(
    title = "Cumulative Distribution",
    x = "Distance (Î¼m or pixels)",
    y = "Cumulative Probability",
    color = "Condition"
  )

print(p4a_cumulative)

# Combine plots
p4a_combined <- p4a_violin | p4a_cumulative

# Save
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_dir, "Figure4/Figure4A_NN_Distance.png"),
  plot = p4a_combined,
  width = 12,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_dir, "Figure4/Figure4A_NN_Distance.pdf"),
  plot = p4a_combined,
  width = 12,
  height = 6
)

# Save statistics
write.csv(
  nn_distances_df,
  file.path(output_dir, "Statistics/Figure4A_NN_distances.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  stat_test,
  file.path(output_dir, "Statistics/Figure4A_statistical_tests.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("âœ… Figure 4A created and saved\n\n")
```

## Figure 4B: Co-localization Index (Data-Driven Threshold)

```{r figure4b_colocalization, fig.width=14, fig.height=10}
cat("=== Creating Figure 4B: Co-localization Index ===\n")
cat("Using data-driven threshold (25th percentile of distance distribution)\n\n")

# Step 1: Calculate all Tâ†’Myeloid nearest-neighbor distances
cat("Step 1: Calculating all Tâ†’Myeloid distances...\n")
all_nn_distances <- c()

for (sample_id in unique(cosmx$sample)) {
  tcells_sample <- subset(tcells, subset = sample == sample_id)
  myeloid_sample <- subset(myeloid, subset = sample == sample_id)
  
  if (ncol(tcells_sample) > 0 && ncol(myeloid_sample) > 0) {
    tcell_coords <- tcells_sample@meta.data[, c(x_col, y_col)]
    myeloid_coords <- myeloid_sample@meta.data[, c(x_col, y_col)]
    
    nn_dists <- apply(tcell_coords, 1, function(tcell_pos) {
      distances <- sqrt(
        (myeloid_coords[, 1] - tcell_pos[1])^2 +
        (myeloid_coords[, 2] - tcell_pos[2])^2
      )
      min(distances)
    })
    
    all_nn_distances <- c(all_nn_distances, nn_dists)
  }
}

# Step 2: Set data-driven threshold (25th percentile)
coloc_threshold <- quantile(all_nn_distances, 0.25)

cat("\n=== Distance Distribution Statistics ===\n")
cat("  Total pairs analyzed:", length(all_nn_distances), "\n")
cat("  25th percentile (THRESHOLD):", round(coloc_threshold, 4), "\n")
cat("  Median:", round(median(all_nn_distances), 4), "\n")
cat("  75th percentile:", round(quantile(all_nn_distances, 0.75), 4), "\n\n")

# Calculate co-localization index for each sample
coloc_results_list <- list()

for (sample_id in unique(cosmx$sample)) {
  cat("\nProcessing sample:", sample_id, "\n")
  
  # Get T cells and Myeloid cells
  tcells_sample <- subset(tcells, subset = sample == sample_id)
  myeloid_sample <- subset(myeloid, subset = sample == sample_id)
  
  if (ncol(tcells_sample) > 0 && ncol(myeloid_sample) > 0) {
    
    # Extract coordinates
    tcell_coords <- tcells_sample@meta.data[, c(x_col, y_col)]
    myeloid_coords <- myeloid_sample@meta.data[, c(x_col, y_col)]
    
    # Count T cells with nearby myeloid cells
    tcells_with_myeloid <- sum(apply(tcell_coords, 1, function(tcell_pos) {
      distances <- sqrt(
        (myeloid_coords[, 1] - tcell_pos[1])^2 +
        (myeloid_coords[, 2] - tcell_pos[2])^2
      )
      any(distances <= coloc_threshold)
    }))
    
    # Count myeloid cells with nearby T cells
    myeloid_with_tcells <- sum(apply(myeloid_coords, 1, function(myeloid_pos) {
      distances <- sqrt(
        (tcell_coords[, 1] - myeloid_pos[1])^2 +
        (tcell_coords[, 2] - myeloid_pos[2])^2
      )
      any(distances <= coloc_threshold)
    }))
    
    # Calculate co-localization indices
    tcell_coloc_index <- tcells_with_myeloid / nrow(tcell_coords)
    myeloid_coloc_index <- myeloid_with_tcells / nrow(myeloid_coords)
    
    # Store results
    coloc_results_list[[sample_id]] <- data.frame(
      sample = sample_id,
      condition = unique(tcells_sample$condition)[1],
      n_tcells = nrow(tcell_coords),
      n_myeloid = nrow(myeloid_coords),
      tcells_with_myeloid = tcells_with_myeloid,
      myeloid_with_tcells = myeloid_with_tcells,
      tcell_coloc_index = tcell_coloc_index,
      myeloid_coloc_index = myeloid_coloc_index
    )
    
    cat("  T cells with nearby myeloid:", tcells_with_myeloid, 
        "(", round(tcell_coloc_index * 100, 1), "%)\n")
    cat("  Myeloid with nearby T cells:", myeloid_with_tcells, 
        "(", round(myeloid_coloc_index * 100, 1), "%)\n")
  }
}

# Combine results
coloc_df <- bind_rows(coloc_results_list)

cat("\nâœ… Co-localization indices calculated\n\n")

# Visualization: Bar plot
p4b_tcell <- ggplot(coloc_df, aes(x = sample, y = tcell_coloc_index * 100, fill = condition)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = condition_colors) +
  theme_publication() +
  labs(
    title = "T Cells with Nearby Myeloid",
    x = "Sample",
    y = "Co-localization Index (%)",
    fill = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

p4b_myeloid <- ggplot(coloc_df, aes(x = sample, y = myeloid_coloc_index * 100, fill = condition)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = condition_colors) +
  theme_publication() +
  labs(
    title = "Myeloid Cells with Nearby T Cells",
    x = "Sample",
    y = "Co-localization Index (%)",
    fill = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

p4b_combined <- p4b_tcell / p4b_myeloid +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Figure 4B: T Cell Ã— Myeloid Co-localization",
    subtitle = sprintf("Co-localization threshold: %.4f pixels", coloc_threshold),
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
  )

print(p4b_combined)

# Save
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_dir, "Figure4/Figure4B_Colocalization_Index.png"),
  plot = p4b_combined,
  width = 10,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_dir, "Figure4/Figure4B_Colocalization_Index.pdf"),
  plot = p4b_combined,
  width = 10,
  height = 10
)

# Save statistics
write.csv(
  coloc_df,
  file.path(output_dir, "Statistics/Figure4B_colocalization_indices.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("âœ… Figure 4B created and saved\n\n")
```

## Figure 4C: Exhaustion-High T Ã— Myeloid-Activation-High Overlap
```{r figure4c_overlap, fig.width=14, fig.height=10}
cat("=== Creating Figure 4C: Exhaustion-High T Ã— Myeloid-Activation-High Overlap ===\n")

# Signature scoreåˆ—ã‚’å®šç¾©
exhaustion_col <- "T_cell_Exhaustion_1"
myeloid_col <- "Myeloid_Activation_1"

# åˆ—ã®å­˜åœ¨ç¢ºèª
cat("Checking for required signature scores...\n")
cat("  Looking for:", exhaustion_col, "...")
if (exhaustion_col %in% colnames(cosmx@meta.data)) {
  cat("âœ… Found\n")
} else {
  cat("âŒ Not found\n")
}

cat("  Looking for:", myeloid_col, "...")
if (myeloid_col %in% colnames(cosmx@meta.data)) {
  cat("âœ… Found\n")
} else {
  cat("âŒ Not found\n")
}

if (exhaustion_col %in% colnames(cosmx@meta.data) && 
    myeloid_col %in% colnames(cosmx@meta.data)) {
  
  cat("\nâœ… Both signature scores found, proceeding with Figure 4C\n\n")
  
  # Define high-score cells (top 25%)
  exhaustion_threshold <- quantile(tcells@meta.data[[exhaustion_col]], 0.9, na.rm = TRUE)
  myeloid_threshold <- quantile(myeloid@meta.data[[myeloid_col]], 0.9, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  cat("Exhaustion threshold (90th percentile):", round(exhaustion_threshold, 3), "\n")
  cat("Myeloid Activation threshold (90th percentile):", round(myeloid_threshold, 3), "\n\n")
  
  # Identify high-score cells
  tcells$high_exhaustion <- tcells@meta.data[[exhaustion_col]] > exhaustion_threshold
  myeloid$high_activation <- myeloid@meta.data[[myeloid_col]] > myeloid_threshold
  
  cat("High-exhaustion T cells:", sum(tcells$high_exhaustion, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("High-activation Myeloid cells:", sum(myeloid$high_activation, na.rm = TRUE), "\n\n")
  
  # Create spatial plots for each sample
  p4c_list <- list()
  
  for (sample_id in unique(cosmx$sample)) {
    cat("Plotting sample:", sample_id, "\n")
    
    # Subset cells
    tcells_sample <- subset(tcells, subset = sample == sample_id)
    myeloid_sample <- subset(myeloid, subset = sample == sample_id)
    immune_sample <- subset(immune_cells, subset = sample == sample_id)
    
    # Get coordinates
    tcells_high <- subset(tcells_sample, subset = high_exhaustion == TRUE)
    myeloid_high <- subset(myeloid_sample, subset = high_activation == TRUE)
    
    # Prepare data for plotting
    plot_data <- rbind(
      data.frame(
        x = immune_sample@meta.data[[x_col]],
        y = immune_sample@meta.data[[y_col]],
        cell_type = "Other Immune",
        high_score = FALSE
      ),
      data.frame(
        x = tcells_high@meta.data[[x_col]],
        y = tcells_high@meta.data[[y_col]],
        cell_type = "High Exhaustion T",
        high_score = TRUE
      ),
      data.frame(
        x = myeloid_high@meta.data[[x_col]],
        y = myeloid_high@meta.data[[y_col]],
        cell_type = "High Activation Myeloid",
        high_score = TRUE
      )
    )
    
    # Create plot
    p4c_sample <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = x, y = y, color = cell_type, size = high_score, alpha = high_score)) +
      geom_point() +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c(
          "Other Immune" = "grey80",
          "High Exhaustion T" = "#E41A1C",
          "High Activation Myeloid" = "#4DAF4A"
        )
      ) +
      scale_size_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 0.3, "TRUE" = 1.5), guide = "none") +
      scale_alpha_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 0.3, "TRUE" = 1), guide = "none") +
      theme_publication() +
      theme(
        aspect.ratio = 1,
        legend.position = "bottom"
      ) +
      labs(
        title = sample_id,
        x = "X coordinate",
        y = "Y coordinate",
        color = "Cell Type"
      ) +
      guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3, alpha = 1)))
    
    p4c_list[[sample_id]] <- p4c_sample
  }
  
  # Combine plots
p4c_combined <- wrap_plots(p4c_list, ncol = 2, guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Figure 4C: Spatial Co-localization of High-Score Cells",
    subtitle = "Exhaustion-high T cells (red) Ã— Myeloid-Activation-high cells (green)",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
  ) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  print(p4c_combined)
  
  # Save
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(output_dir, "Figure4/Figure4C_HighScore_Overlap.png"),
    plot = p4c_combined,
    width = 14,
    height = 10,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(output_dir, "Figure4/Figure4C_HighScore_Overlap.pdf"),
    plot = p4c_combined,
    width = 14,
    height = 10
  )
  
  cat("âœ… Figure 4C created and saved\n\n")
  
} else {
  cat("\nâš ï¸ Signature scores not found, skipping Figure 4C\n")
  cat("Available score columns:\n")
  print(grep("_1$|Score", colnames(cosmx@meta.data), value = TRUE))
  cat("\n")
}
```

## Figure 4D: Spatial Correlation (Ripley's K)

```{r figure4d_ripley, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
cat("=== Creating Figure 4D: Spatial Correlation Analysis ===\n")

# Ripley's K function analysis for each sample
ripley_results_list <- list()

for (sample_id in unique(cosmx$sample)) {
  cat("\nProcessing sample:", sample_id, "\n")
  
  # Get T cells and Myeloid cells
  tcells_sample <- subset(tcells, subset = sample == sample_id)
  myeloid_sample <- subset(myeloid, subset = sample == sample_id)
  
  if (ncol(tcells_sample) >= 10 && ncol(myeloid_sample) >= 10) {
    
    # Extract coordinates
    tcell_coords <- tcells_sample@meta.data[, c(x_col, y_col)]
    myeloid_coords <- myeloid_sample@meta.data[, c(x_col, y_col)]
    
    # Create point patterns
    # Define observation window
    xrange <- range(c(tcell_coords[, 1], myeloid_coords[, 1]))
    yrange <- range(c(tcell_coords[, 2], myeloid_coords[, 2]))
    win <- owin(xrange = xrange, yrange = yrange)
    
    # Create marked point pattern
    coords_all <- rbind(
      data.frame(x = tcell_coords[, 1], y = tcell_coords[, 2], marks = "T_cell"),
      data.frame(x = myeloid_coords[, 1], y = myeloid_coords[, 2], marks = "Myeloid")
    )
    
    pp <- ppp(
      x = coords_all$x,
      y = coords_all$y,
      marks = factor(coords_all$marks),
      window = win
    )
    
    # Calculate cross-type Ripley's K
    tryCatch({
      K_cross <- Kcross(pp, i = "T_cell", j = "Myeloid", correction = "border")
      
      # Extract results
      ripley_results_list[[sample_id]] <- data.frame(
        sample = sample_id,
        condition = unique(tcells_sample$condition)[1],
        r = K_cross$r,
        K_obs = K_cross$border,
        K_theo = K_cross$theo
      )
      
      cat("  Ripley's K calculated\n")
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("  âš ï¸ Error calculating Ripley's K:", e$message, "\n")
    })
  }
}

# Combine results
if (length(ripley_results_list) > 0) {
  ripley_df <- bind_rows(ripley_results_list)
  
  cat("\nâœ… Ripley's K analysis completed\n\n")
  
  # Calculate L function (normalized K)
  ripley_df$L_obs <- sqrt(ripley_df$K_obs / pi) - ripley_df$r
  ripley_df$L_theo <- sqrt(ripley_df$K_theo / pi) - ripley_df$r
  
  # Visualization
  p4d <- ggplot(ripley_df, aes(x = r, y = L_obs, color = sample)) +
    geom_line(size = 1) +
    geom_line(aes(y = L_theo), color = "black", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = sample_colors) +
    facet_wrap(~ condition, ncol = 2) +
    theme_publication() +
    labs(
      title = "Figure 4D: Spatial Correlation Analysis (Ripley's K)",
      subtitle = "L(r) function: positive values indicate clustering at distance r",
      x = "Distance (r)",
      y = "L(r) - r",
      color = "Sample"
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "grey50") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  print(p4d)
  
  # Save
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(output_dir, "Figure4/Figure4D_Ripley_K.png"),
    plot = p4d,
    width = 12,
    height = 8,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(output_dir, "Figure4/Figure4D_Ripley_K.pdf"),
    plot = p4d,
    width = 12,
    height = 8
  )
  
  # Save statistics
  write.csv(
    ripley_df,
    file.path(output_dir, "Statistics/Figure4D_Ripley_K_results.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
  cat("âœ… Figure 4D created and saved\n\n")
  
} else {
  cat("âš ï¸ Ripley's K analysis failed for all samples\n\n")
}
```

```{r figure4_summary}
cat("Key Findings:\n")
cat("  - Tç´°èƒžã¨éª¨é«„ç³»ç´°èƒžã®ç©ºé–“çš„è¿‘æŽ¥æ€§ã‚’å®šé‡åŒ–\n")
```

## è«–æ–‡ã‚¹ãƒˆãƒ¼ãƒªãƒ¼çµ±åˆ

```{r story_integration}
cat("=== MANUSCRIPT STORY INTEGRATION ===\n\n")

cat("Figure 1: Study Design & Data Overview (å®Œæˆæ¸ˆã¿)\n")
cat("  â†’ ãƒ‡ãƒ¼ã‚¿ã‚»ãƒƒãƒˆã®å…¨ä½“åƒ\n\n")

cat("Figure 2: ICI-Specific Signatures (ä»Šå›žå®Œæˆ)\n")
cat("  â†’ scFFPEç”±æ¥ã®ã‚·ã‚°ãƒãƒãƒ£ãƒ¼ç™ºè¦‹\n")
```

# å®Œäº†

**ã“ã®Rmdãƒ•ã‚¡ã‚¤ãƒ«ã§ä»¥ä¸‹ã‚’é”æˆ:**

1. âœ… scFFPE Figure 2ãƒ‘ãƒãƒ« (2B, 2C) ã®ä½œæˆ
2. âœ… CosMx Figure 4å…¨ãƒ‘ãƒãƒ« (4A-4D) ã®ä½œæˆ
3. âœ… é©åˆ‡ãªãƒ•ã‚¡ã‚¤ãƒ«ãƒ‘ã‚¹ã¨ãƒ‡ãƒ¼ã‚¿æ§‹é€ ã®ä½¿ç”¨
4. âœ… Claudeã¨ChatGPTã®ææ¡ˆã®çµ±åˆ
5. âœ… è«–æ–‡ã¨ã—ã¦è«–ç†çš„ãªæ§‹æˆ

**Output files:**
- Figure2/Figure2B_scFFPE_UMAP.png/pdf
- Figure2/Figure2C_scFFPE_DEG_heatmap.png/pdf
- Figure4/Figure4A_NN_Distance.png/pdf
- Figure4/Figure4B_Colocalization_Index.png/pdf
- Figure4/Figure4C_HighScore_Overlap.png/pdf
- Figure4/Figure4D_Ripley_K.png/pdf
- Statistics/*.csv (all statistical results)

**è«–æ–‡ã¸ã®çµ±åˆ:**
ã“ã®Rmdã§ä½œæˆã•ã‚ŒãŸFigure 2ã¨Figure 4ã«ã‚ˆã‚Šã€
scFFPEç”±æ¥ã‚·ã‚°ãƒãƒãƒ£ãƒ¼ã®ã‚½ãƒ¼ã‚¹ã‚¨ãƒ“ãƒ‡ãƒ³ã‚¹ã¨ã€
ç©ºé–“çš„ç´°èƒžé–“ç›¸äº’ä½œç”¨ã®å®Ÿè¨¼ãŒå®Œæˆã—ã¾ã—ãŸã€‚
